2026-04-13T17:45:06.1455945Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (2075 chars):
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1457134Z ---
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1457903Z description: |
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1459013Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1461286Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1463177Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1464882Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1465239Z on:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1465935Z   push:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1466647Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1467467Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1467968Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1468316Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1468828Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1469447Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1469934Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1470253Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1471079Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1472030Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1472764Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1473457Z   noop:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1474184Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1475059Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1475761Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1477274Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1478806Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1480022Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1480941Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1481982Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1482763Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1483554Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1484311Z       steps:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1485069Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1486097Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1487067Z           env:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1488273Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1489998Z           with:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1490715Z             script: |
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1491721Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1493040Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1494423Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1495692Z                 return;
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1496502Z               }
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1496919Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1497834Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1499622Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1500680Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1501603Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1503372Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1505097Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1506981Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1508231Z               }
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1508669Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1509726Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1511009Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1511927Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1513017Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1513973Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }

2026-04-13T17:45:06.1646916Z   workflow_dispatch:

2026-04-13T17:45:06.1648206Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1648505Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1648950Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1649727Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1650527Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1651443Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1652148Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1652800Z   noop:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1653512Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1654341Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1655005Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1656262Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1657757Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1658633Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1659795Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1660806Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1661550Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1662326Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1663073Z       steps:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1663822Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1664837Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1665798Z           env:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1667396Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1668886Z           with:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1669807Z             script: |
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1670827Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1676706Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1678180Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1680128Z                 return;
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1680906Z               }
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1681321Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1681773Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1683277Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1684333Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1685261Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1687117Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1688827Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1693914Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1695514Z               }
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1696061Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1696631Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1697886Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1698790Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1700159Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1701090Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1702146Z               });
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1703112Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1704029Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1704319Z tools:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1704990Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1705671Z   github:
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1706368Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1706932Z 
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1707256Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1708405Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1710007Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-13T17:45:06.1732655Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
